binary_metadata.file_type: a sh script, ASCII text executable

apt_metadata.description:
32-bit assembler level analysing debugger
OllyDbg is a 32-bit assembler level analysing debugger for
Microsoft Windows. Emphasis on binary code analysis makes
it particularly useful in cases where source is
unavailable.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ollydbg because ### ollydbg.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ollydbg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ollydbg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### ollydbg.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ollydbg
Install with: sudo apt install ollydbg
